home.title: Connect with Expert Astrologers

home.expertDesc: Connect with verified and experienced astrologers from across India.
home.liveDesc: Real-time video and voice calls for accurate readings and personal guidance.
home.secureDesc: Your consultations are completely confidential and secure.
home.affordableDesc: Transparent pricing with no hidden charges. Pay only for the time you use.

about.title: About AstroCall
about.subtitle: Bridging the ancient wisdom of astrology with modern technology to bring you meaningful, personalized guidance — anytime, anywhere.
about.ourStoryP1: AstroCall was born from a simple idea — what if anyone, regardless of where they live, could speak directly with a trusted, experienced astrologer in real time?
about.ourStoryP2: Founded in 2025, AstroCall set out to create a seamless digital platform where seekers of cosmic guidance can instantly connect with verified astrologers through high-quality video and voice calls.
about.ourStoryP3: Today, AstroCall serves thousands of users every month, with a growing community of professional astrologers from across India and beyond.
about.whatWeOfferDesc: AstroCall is more than just a calling platform — it's a complete ecosystem designed around your spiritual needs.
about.howItWorksDesc: Getting started with AstroCall is simple.
about.forAstrologersDesc: Are you a practicing astrologer looking to expand your reach? AstroCall gives you a powerful platform to connect with clients worldwide.
about.ctaDesc: Whether you're seeking answers from the cosmos or you're an astrologer ready to share your wisdom — AstroCall is the platform for you.
